# Release Checklist

- [ ] All pages build.
- [ ] Route catalog current.
- [ ] No menu stacking.
- [ ] No blank navigation states.
- [ ] No `Loading…` / `0 routes` placeholders in primary pages.
- [ ] Docs links valid.
- [ ] No unsupported claims.
- [ ] No wallet/public action primitives on public demo pages.
- [ ] No analytics/cookies/forms.
- [ ] Data contracts present.
- [ ] Schemas present.
- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Production URL verified.
- [ ] Legal/privacy/token boundaries preserved.
- [ ] Expert-console separation preserved.
